name: Beef and Pork Tenderloin Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a small mixing bowl and mix well.
2. Place the beef and pork tenderloins in a large pan or dish. Pour the marinade over the top, ensuring each piece is coated, and cover tightly.
3. Refrigerate the marinated meat overnight, turning it several times to ensure even coating.
4. Drain the meat before refrigerating.
5. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
6. Place the beef tenderloin, fat side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan. Rub with 1 tablespoon vegetable oil and bake for 15 minutes. Turn off the oven and do not open the door. Let the roast remain in the oven for an additional 45 minutes (the roast will be medium rare).
7. Place the pork tenderloins, fat side up, on a rack in another shallow roasting pan. Rub with 1 teaspoon vegetable oil and bake at 325°F (160°C) until well done.
8. Slice the tenderloins and place them on a serving platter.
9. Serve on party rye bread with endive. Optionally top with mayonnaise, barbecue sauce, or horseradish as desired.
Yield: about 24 servings
